title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-77: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of robotically assisted surgical equipment
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-77部分：机器人辅助手术设备的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of robotically assisted surgical equipment (RASE) and its accessories. Edition 1.
standards.scope: Robotically assisted surgical equipment and accessories.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-78: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of medical robots for rehabilitation, assessment, compensation or alleviation
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-78部分：用于康复、评估、补偿或缓解的医用机器人的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of medical robots used for rehabilitation, assessment, compensation or alleviation. Edition 1.
standards.scope: Medical robots for rehabilitation and assistive purposes.

title.en: Robots and robotic devices - Safety requirements for personal care robots
title.zh: 机器人和机器人装置 - 个人护理机器人的安全要求

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and guidelines for safe design and protective measures of personal care robots, including mobile servant robots, physical assistant robots, and person carrier robots. Confirmed 2020.
standards.scope: Safety requirements for personal care robots (applicable to medical service robots).

title.en: Security for industrial automation and control systems - Part 4-2: Technical security requirements for IACS components
title.zh: 工业自动化和控制系统安全 - 第4-2部分：IACS组件的技术安全要求

standards.abstract: Provides technical security requirements at the component level for industrial automation and control systems. Applicable to networked surgical robot components. Edition 1.1.
standards.scope: Component-level security for networked robotic surgical systems.

title.en: Robots and robotic devices - Collaborative robots
title.zh: 机器人和机器人装置 - 协作机器人

standards.abstract: Specifies safety requirements for collaborative industrial robot systems and the work environment. Applicable principles relevant to human-robot interaction in surgical and rehabilitation robotics. Confirmed 2021.
standards.scope: Safety requirements for collaborative robots (applicable principles for medical human-robot interaction).
